nodes.label: Intercept NOTIFY_DEBUGGER_ABOUT_RX_PAGES and touch the pages.
nodes.norm_label: intercept notify_debugger_about_rx_pages and touch the pages.

nodes.label: LogiRed Logistics App
nodes.rationale: Declared as 'LogiRed - App de logística', version 1.0.0+1, publish_to none: a private multi-platform Flutter logistics application.

nodes.label: flutter_launcher_icons config
nodes.rationale: Generates Android (min SDK 21, adaptive icon with white background) and iOS (alpha removed, white background) launcher icons from assets/images/logo_icon.png.

nodes.label: Custom Turn-by-Turn Navigation Stack
nodes.rationale: The dependency mix (google_maps_flutter + geolocator + flutter_compass + flutter_tts) indicates in-app turn-by-turn guidance built on the base Maps widget with voice prompts and device heading, rather than a dedicated navigation SDK.

nodes.label: Real-time Vehicle Tracking over WebSocket
nodes.rationale: web_socket_channel plus GPS and map dependencies imply live position streaming between driver and client, a core feature of a logistics app.

nodes.label: Dart Analyzer Lint Configuration
nodes.rationale: Includes package:flutter_lints/flutter.yaml with no custom rule overrides (all example rules left commented out).

nodes.label: Linux Bundle Install Layout
nodes.rationale: Only the install-generated bundle's copy of the executable launches correctly because resources must sit at the right relative locations; the unbundled binary is emitted into 'intermediates_do_not_run' to stop people running it directly.

nodes.label: Phony Output Forced Rebuild (Linux)
nodes.rationale: A non-existent _phony_ output forces the flutter tool backend to run on every build because the tool cannot provide a full input/output list.

nodes.label: Windows In-Place Install Layout
nodes.rationale: Support files are copied next to the executable instead of into a separate bundle (as on Linux) so that building and running from within Visual Studio works.

nodes.label: Phony Output Forced Rebuild (Windows)
nodes.rationale: A symbolic _phony_ output forces the flutter tool backend to run on every build because the tool cannot provide a full input/output list.

nodes.label: Car Marker Sprite (top-down green car)
nodes.rationale: Cartoon-style top-down (bird's-eye) view of a green car with dark windshield and red rear bumper on a transparent background. The strict overhead perspective and portrait orientation are characteristic of a rotatable map marker used to show a vehicle's live position and heading.

nodes.label: LogiRed Brand Logo (LR road monogram)
nodes.rationale: Green monogram combining the letters L and R where the R's stroke forms a winding road/highway receding to the horizon, with small leaf/field shapes beside it — imagery of routes and logistics matching the app's domain.

nodes.label: LogiRed Launcher Icon (LR monogram variant)
nodes.rationale: Square, larger-canvas rendition of the same green LR road monogram, padded for use as the Android/iOS launcher icon (referenced by the flutter_launcher_icons config).
